title: (Bullish Signal) SINA, Moving Average Convergence Divergence Histogram just turned positive
author: tickeron_community
selftext:
This is a Bullish indicator signaling SINA's price could rise from here. Traders may explore going long the stock or buying call options. Tickeron's A.I. dvisor identified 44 similar cases where SINA's MACD histogram became positive, and 36 of them led to successful outcomes. Odds of Success: 82%. Current price $43.32 is above $42.88 the highest support line found by Tickeron A.I. Throughout the month of 10/16/20 - 11/17/20, the price experienced a +2% Uptrend. During the week of 11/10/20 - 11/17/20, the stock enjoyed a +0.86% Uptrend growth.

https://preview.redd.it/q6qvmatds1061.png?width=1534&format=png&auto=webp&s=7881cb2604a730d56a855237c9b8d50d8167a800

**Bullish Trend Analysis**

The Momentum Indicator moved above the 0 level on November 10, 2020. You may want to consider a long position or call options on SINA as a result. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 59 of 95 past instances where the momentum indicator moved above 0, the stock continued to climb. The odds of a continued upward trend are 62%.

SINA moved above its 50-day Moving Average on September 28, 2020 date and that indicates a change from a downward trend to an upward trend.

The 10-day Moving Average for SINA crossed bullishly above the 50-day moving average on September 24, 2020. This indicates that the trend has shifted higher and could be considered a buy signal. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 12 of 18 past instances when the 10-day crossed above the 50-day, the stock continued to move higher over the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 67%.

Following a +0.12% 3-day Advance, the price is estimated to grow further. Considering data from situations where SINA advanced for three days, in 208 of 294 cases, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued upward trend are 71%.

The Aroon Indicator entered an Uptrend today. Tickeron A.I. detected that in 147 of 233 cases where SINA Aroon's Indicator entered an Uptrend, the price rose further within the following month. The odds of a continued Uptrend are 63%.
